inputs.label: Initial Velocity
inputs.businessContext: Speed of the ball as it leaves the bat.

inputs.label: Launch Angle
inputs.businessContext: Angle between the initial trajectory and the horizontal field.

inputs.label: Initial Height
inputs.businessContext: Height above ground at which the ball is hit.

inputs.label: Gravity
inputs.businessContext: Acceleration due to gravity (9.81 m/s² on Earth).

formulas.range: initialVelocity * Math.cos(launchAngle * Math.PI / 180) * ((initialVelocity * Math.sin(launchAngle * Math.PI / 180) + Math.sqrt(Math.pow(initialVelocity * Math.sin(launchAngle * Math.PI / 180), 2) + 2 * gravity * initialHeight)) / gravity)
formulas.hangTime: (initialVelocity * Math.sin(launchAngle * Math.PI / 180) + Math.sqrt(Math.pow(initialVelocity * Math.sin(launchAngle * Math.PI / 180), 2) + 2 * gravity * initialHeight)) / gravity
formulas.finalVelocity: Math.sqrt(Math.pow(initialVelocity * Math.cos(launchAngle * Math.PI / 180), 2) + Math.pow(Math.sqrt(Math.pow(initialVelocity * Math.sin(launchAngle * Math.PI / 180), 2) + 2 * gravity * initialHeight), 2))
